raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Citizens Redistricting Commission (CRC) established an existing congressional map in 2021.",
    "Governor Newsom's 'Election Rigging' package includes legislation that seeks to set aside the congressional map established by the CRC.",
    "The proposed congressional district map is claimed to be highly partisan and aimed at eliminating five Republican congressional seats.",
    "The legislation proposes to replace existing congressional district maps with new maps that are drawn by politicians if approved by voters.",
    "There is a 72-hour rule in California intended to ensure transparency and accountability in the legislative process."
  ]
}
```
